summary: EXP-082 complete: Four surgical patches for Part 5 Kill-Shot Tests. (1) Fixed TLDR false claim of 30% falsification threshold — actual is >50% for 3 consecutive years. (2) Fixed opening paragraph four-are-pending vs table discrepancy. (3) Fixed NMP observed rate from ~35 to ~38 km/yr (consistent with 39.9% error figure), showed independent calculation matches dome figure. (4) Added closing paragraph invoking dome binary rule as capstone. Dome Says column was already fixed in current version. Polaris offset and Test 5 stub are separate issues needing their own EXPs.
